features: BRIGHT & WATERPROOF: Masterplast Neon Plasters are the ideal dressings for use in and around water. Easily visible colours offering total protection in the shower, washing and swimming. Inlcudes a variety of sizes for cuts and grazes.
PROTECT: Each plaster is air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, top later protects from water and other liquids, dirt and dust.
LONG LASTING: Providing long lasting waterproof wound protection. Durable neon bright top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals:
ASSORTED SIZES: Includes 60 plasters in four sizes suitable for a variety of cuts and grazes, 15 of 72mm x 40mm, 15 of 72mm x 25mm, 15 of 40mm x 10mm, 15 of 22mm diameter.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 60 Plasters.
description: Product Description Masterplast Neon Plasters are the ideal dressings for use in and around water. Easily visible colours offering total protection in the shower, whilst washing and swimming. Inlcudes a variety of sizes for cuts and grazes. Durable waterproof top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals. Includes 60 plasters in four sizes suitable for a variety of cuts and grazes, 20 of 72mm x 40mm, 20 of 72mm x 25mm, 20 of 40mm x 10mm, 20 of 22mm diameter. Box of 80 Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster, and press gently to secure it.
